title: platylepis occulta
intro: Platylepis occulta, also known as the hidden lip orchid, is a rare and endangered plant species native to Australia. It has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues, due to its ability to soothe and calm the body. Platylepis occulta is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve.
